title: How long can Iran survive the US blockade? — Al Jazeera analysis
snippet: Al Jazeera analysis examines Iran's economic resilience under US blockade. Iran's oil exports (normally ~1.3 million bpd) effectively zero since blockade began. Strategic reserves estimated 60-90 days. Sanctions evasion networks degraded. Food imports via land borders (Turkey, Pakistan) continue but strained. IRGC controls black market distribution. Inflation spiking. Analysts estimate 3-6 month window before severe economic crisis.
tag_reason: Substantive analysis of Iran's blockade survival capacity — 3-6 month timeline estimate and reserve data are new analytical contributions.
